description_long: This object is a compact, boxy combat tactical vehicle with a robust, angular body and four large, cylindrical wheels positioned at the corners. The main chassis appears heavily armored, with a high, flat-sided profile and a small, protected cab area featuring visible grilles and possibly reinforced windows. The wheels are thick and solid, suggesting off-road or all-terrain capability, and are spaced apart from the main body, likely for enhanced stability. There are no visible weapon mounts or turrets, but the vehicle's design suggests a focus on protection and mobility. The exterior is a uniform dark color, with no visible camouflage, markings, or insignia. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some rubber components for the wheels.
description: A compact, boxy armored combat tactical vehicle with four large, solid wheels and a dark, uniform exterior. The design emphasizes protection and mobility, with no visible weapon mounts or markings.
description_view_0: Front-side view showing the boxy armored cab, grille details, and two large wheels on either side.
description_view_1: Top-down, exploded view revealing the separation of the wheels from the main chassis and the angular body structure.
description_view_2: Rear-side view highlighting the back of the armored body and the rear wheels, with minimal surface features.
description_view_3: Exploded side view showing the wheels spaced apart from the main body and the angular, robust chassis.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, flat armor panels; no visible sloping or modular features.
attribute_tire_type: Four large, solid off-road tires with no visible tread pattern or special features.
